overall.description: Game engine footage from a bus simulator depicting a driver navigating through heavy rain in a modern German city. The bus stops at a sheltered bus stop for passenger boarding, then continues through a covered underpass and past construction barriers on a multi-lane urban road.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet city street with modern office buildings and traffic signals

events.description: traffic light changes from red to green, bus proceeds forward
bus slows down to approach the bus stop shelter ahead

agents.ego_description: operating the bus through heavy rain with windshield wipers active, stopping at red light then proceeding toward bus stop

entered.detail: bus driver control panel with speedometer and various buttons visible throughout the cabin
active wipers clearing heavy rain from the front windshield
vertical traffic signal showing red then green
tall contemporary office buildings with reflective glass facades lining the street
covered bus stop structure with glass panels and red signage approaching in the distance

segments.scene_description: The bus drives through a heavy downpour on a modern city street, windshield wipers working constantly. The vehicle stops at a red traffic light before proceeding toward a bus stop shelter visible ahead, with contemporary glass office buildings lining the wet asphalt road.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered bus stop shelter with passenger boarding area

events.description: bus comes to complete stop at the bus stop shelter
bus doors open and passengers begin boarding from the right side
doors close and bus begins to pull away from the stop

agents.ego_description: stopped at bus stop with doors open, monitoring passengers as they board the vehicle

notable_agents.action: male passenger in dark shirt and light pants entering through the front door
female passenger in orange top entering through the front door after the first passenger

entered.detail: red horizontal banner with white BERLIN text and pedestrian symbols hanging at the bus stop
transparent glass panels forming the shelter structure on the right side of the bus
interior lighting and ceiling panels of the bus driver cabin becoming more visible

segments.scene_description: The bus stops under a sheltered bus stop with a prominent red BERLIN banner. Passengers board from the right side while the bus remains stationary with doors open. After boarding completes, the doors close and the bus prepares to depart the sheltered area.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered bus station underpass with concrete and glass walls

events.description: bus enters covered underpass area leaving the open bus stop behind
moving deeper into covered area where artificial lighting dominates over natural light

agents.ego_description: accelerating through the covered underpass with concrete walls on sides and artificial lighting overhead

entered.detail: enclosed concrete and glass structure forming a covered roadway or bus station area
solid concrete barrier walls on the left side of the underpass
transparent glass sections in the wall structure allowing limited visibility outside
row of artificial lighting fixtures illuminating the covered roadway

segments.scene_description: The bus departs the stop and enters a covered underpass or bus station structure with concrete walls and glass panels. Artificial lighting replaces natural daylight as the vehicle accelerates through this semi-enclosed corridor, protected from the heavy rain outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane urban arterial with construction barriers and distant skyline

events.description: bus exits the covered underpass back into the open rain with sky visible
navigating past red and white construction barriers lining the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: driving on multi-lane road past construction barriers, heading toward distant city skyline with tall buildings

notable_agents.action: white car passing the bus on the left side in the adjacent lane

entered.detail: red and white striped plastic construction barriers lining the right side of the roadway
tall modern skyscrapers and high-rise buildings visible in the distance ahead
white painted lane dividers marking multiple lanes on the wide urban road

segments.scene_description: Exiting the underpass, the bus returns to the open rain on a wide multi-lane urban road. Red and white construction barriers line the right side while the city skyline with tall buildings rises in the distance ahead. A white car passes on the left as the bus continues through the wet conditions.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a rain-drenched city, transitioning from open streets into a sheltered transit hub before returning to a wide urban thoroughfare. It begins with the bus navigating a heavy downpour past glass office buildings, pausing at a red light before pulling into a sheltered stop marked by a red Berlin banner. As passengers board and the doors close, the vehicle departs the shelter and glides into a semi-enclosed underpass, where artificial lighting replaces the gray daylight against concrete walls and glass panels. The scene then opens back up as the bus exits the corridor and returns to the open rain on a multi-lane road. Finally, the camera moves past red and white construction barriers and a passing white car toward a distant city skyline under the persistent storm.
